title: Happy 60th Birthday Pop-Up Card, Happy Birthday 3d Cards Boxed Card Gifts Box 3d Greeting
features: Product Content: There is one set of 60th birthday pop-up cards in the package, including 1 pop-up 60th birthday card, 1 yellow envelope and 1 birthday greeting card. Complete set can meet your gift-giving needs.
Size Information: Our pop-up birthday card measures about 23x23x17.6cm/9x9x6.9in. The envelope is about 19x18cm/7.4x7in, can hold your cards well.

Delicate Design: This birthday card showcases a foldable pop-up carton design that is both captivating and unique. It can function as a meaningful birthday message, a photo prop, a chic decoration, or a party accessory.

Reliable Material: This 60th birthday card is made of premium paper, durable, thick, hard to break or damage, with delicate design. You can jot down heartfelt messages, cute illustrations on the birthday greeting cards.
Perfect Gift: The 3D greeting card is an excellent gift choice for family, friends, aunts, or uncles. They are sure to be thrilled to receive it.
